falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 79% bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower highs and consolidation; this proves the current structure is not a bottoming formation but a failed breakdown or different pattern entirely

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency at pre-correction levels would falsify the bottoming thesis, as the August 2024 bottom featured VIX remaining elevated (15-20) for weeks during base-building; this signals no accumulation phase is occurring

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX simultaneously trades below 5,300
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This divergence—risk-off rates with risk-off equities—breaks the macro regime logic of the August 2024 bottom, where yields fell as equities stabilized (flight-to-quality bid); it indicates a deflationary/recessionary impulse rather than a tactical bottom, invalidating the pattern analogy

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
